notes:
Window capture improvements:
- Captured windows now show as active or inactive to match the look you choose.
- The window picker shows each display's own wallpaper instead of a gray background.
- The window picker arranges many open windows in a grid so they stay large and easy to pick.
- More windows appear in the picker, including System Settings.

Redesigned window border settings:
- Separate Active and Inactive borders, each with its own color and width.
- The active border follows your system accent color by default.
- A new drop shadow toggle for captured windows.

Other fixes:
- Your settings no longer reset when the app updates.
